message:
🐛 Fix missing loading states in NamespaceOverview card (#4006)

Destructure isRefreshing, isFailed, and consecutiveFailures from
useCachedPodIssues, useCachedDeploymentIssues, and useCachedNamespaces
hooks and pass them to useCardLoadingState. Without this, the card
cannot properly show failure indicators or demo data badges when
any of its data sources fail.

Fixes #4002

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
